parameters.name: plan_route
parameters.description: Plan a route with turn-by-turn directions, duration and GPX data. Best for road/urban routes or when you need navigation instructions. The GPX data after '--- GPX DATA ---' can be saved as a .gpx file. Parameters: start (place name or lat,lon), end (place name or lat,lon), waypoints (optional, semicolon-separated intermediate stops), profile (optional: foot-hiking, foot-walking, cycling-regular, cycling-road, cycling-mountain, cycling-electric; default foot-hiking)

value.start: ={{ $fromAI('start', 'Starting location — place name or lat,lon coordinates', 'string') }}
value.profile: ={{ $fromAI('profile', 'Route type: foot-hiking, foot-walking, cycling-regular, cycling-road, cycling-mountain, cycling-electric (default foot-hiking)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: plan_route_outdoor
parameters.description: Plan a hiking or cycling route with superior track quality using BRouter. Returns GPX track optimized for trail surfaces and elevation. No turn-by-turn directions — best for nature trails, mountain routes, cycling tours where you follow the GPS track. Parameters: start (place name or lat,lon), end (place name or lat,lon), waypoints (optional, semicolon-separated), profile (optional: trekking, fastbike, trekking-bike, mtb, safety; default trekking)

value.start: ={{ $fromAI('start', 'Starting location — place name or lat,lon coordinates', 'string') }}
value.profile: ={{ $fromAI('profile', 'Route type: trekking, fastbike, trekking-bike, mtb, safety (default trekking)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: search_place
parameters.description: Geocode a place name or address to get its coordinates. Returns latitude, longitude, region, and country. Useful to verify a location before planning a route. Parameters: query (place name or address), limit (optional, number of results, default 3)

value.query: ={{ $fromAI('query', 'Place name or address to search for', 'string') }}

parameters.name: find_pois
parameters.description: Find nearby points of interest. Default categories: alpine huts, viewpoints, drinking water, picnic sites, peaks. Parameters: location (place name or lat,lon), radius (optional, meters, max 2000, default 1500), categories (optional, comma-separated: alpine_hut, camp_site, viewpoint, drinking_water, parking, restaurant, shelter, picnic_site, peak, toilet, bench)

value.categories: ={{ $fromAI('categories', 'Comma-separated categories: alpine_hut, camp_site, viewpoint, drinking_water, parking, restaurant, shelter, picnic_site, peak, toilet, bench', 'string') }}

parameters.name: get_elevation_profile
parameters.description: Get elevation profile between locations. Shows min/max/avg elevation, total ascent/descent, and an ASCII elevation chart. Parameters: start (place name or lat,lon), end (place name or lat,lon), waypoints (optional, semicolon-separated)

parameters.name: get_isochrone
parameters.description: How far can you get in N minutes from a location? Returns the reachable area size and extent. Parameters: location (place name or lat,lon), time (minutes), profile (optional: foot-hiking, foot-walking, cycling-regular, cycling-road, cycling-mountain, cycling-electric; default foot-hiking)

parameters.name: optimize_route
parameters.description: Find the optimal order for visiting multiple locations. Returns the best route with total distance and duration. Parameters: locations (semicolon-separated, min 3 locations), profile (optional: foot-hiking, foot-walking, cycling-regular, cycling-road, cycling-mountain, cycling-electric, driving-car; default foot-hiking), start_fixed (optional, keep first location as start, default true), end_fixed (optional, keep last location as end, default false)
